articles.title: Big B drops video of ancient Hindu Vishnu temple in Iran, netizens thank him
articles.description: Amitabh Bachchan shared an Instagram video highlighting the historic Bandar Abbas Vishnu Temple in Iran, built in 1892 for Indian Hindu traders. This post illuminated a lesser-known Indo-Iranian historical connection, showcasing the significant role of Indian merchants in the region during the 19th century.

articles.title: The Boys Season 5: Top 7 Shocking Deaths Ahead Of Series Finale

He said he has met special forces and secret services personnel as part of his immersion in their world.

articles.title: Veteran producer K Rajan dies by suicide, Khushbu Sundar shocked

articles.description: Director Park Chan-wook received the Commandeur, the highest rank of the Ordre des Arts et des Lettres, recognising his global contributions to cinema. He joined distinguished Korean artists previously honoured with this prestigious award.

articles.title: MrBeast fires back after viral podcast claim says his YouTube channel views suddenly dropped by 50 percent
articles.description: MrBeast responded after online claims said his YouTube views dropped by 50%. He explained that people were comparing years-old videos with newer uploads. The creator said his older videos continue gaining millions of views every month. Despite the debate, MrBeast remains YouTube’s most-followed individual creator, and his recent videos still attract tens of millions of viewers quickly.

articles.title: Aamir compares Thugs Of Hindostan to Sholay, says decision to do the film bounced badly

He admitted a misstep with 'Thugs of Hindostan,' where focusing on his character backfired. Khan explained the film's script was altered significantly due to casting changes, leading to its eventual failure, a outcome he anticipated.
